Rules.InvariantScript: "Agent-guided canvas intake that turns a rough request into triage-ready fields."
"Describe what is happening, what you need, or what changed."
"Who is affected, how often, and what is blocked?"
"Systems, URLs, screenshots, deadlines, examples, or constraints."

"Developer handoff checklist" & Char(10) & "- Problem statement" & Char(10) & "- Affected users or roles" & Char(10) & "- Business impact and urgency" & Char(10) & "- Expected outcome" & Char(10) & "- Evidence, screenshots, links, or repro steps"
Coalesce(varConversationLog, "Agent: Tell me what the requester needs. I will ask follow-up questions and fill the intake fields as we go.")
Notify("Request draft fields are ready. Connect this screen to Dataverse or SharePoint to submit.", NotificationType.Success)
"Agent prompt: " & Coalesce(varQuestion, "Describe the request, then use Analyze request to generate triage fields.")
